arts.ttl: Celtic among Euro scouts sent to watch Belgian pair alongside Brendan Rodgers long-term target
arts.sum: In the wide areas is where has already been scouted with Michel-Ange Balikwisha still a Celtic target to bolster the attacking areas. The Sun report that duo Noah Sadiki and Franjo Ivanovic both fit the profile Celts are looking for but are on the radar of numerous other sides.

arts.ttl: The unseen Celtic difference maker behind Daizen Maeda goal explosion as unsung hero namechecked
arts.sum: Maeda has been red hot and Rodgers thanked one man for his specific role in his firing form

arts.ttl: Five Brendan Rodgers Celtic presser takeaways as boss reveals Adam Idah mindset amid Daizen Maeda striker run
arts.sum: “Like I said, players just turning out, and clubs like ourselves, we are fortunate in relation to, obviously we play more games, so we have a bigger squad and a pool of players that we can pull on, but there are other teams that will, you look at the pre-season this year, Kilmarnock and teams like that in European football, it’s a real challenge.” “But he can do other things, so he’s out on the training field and working on the technical side of his game.”

arts.ttl: Celtic boss praises 'really good' Johnny Kenny, made to wait due to Maeda's form
arts.sum: Celtic forward Johnny Kenny has been catching the eye in training, but the remarkable form of Daizen Maeda continues to keep him and Adam Idah waiting for their chances in Brendan Rodgers' side.

arts.ttl: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has his say on proposed SPFL league reconstruction
arts.sum: Rodgers and Celtic are against the SPFL 10 team league plan No formal proposal has been laid out officially yet, but Rodgers isn’t convinced the league should be downsized from 12 teams to 10.

arts.ttl: SPFL post split dates and schedule announced as Celtic route to Premiership title party mapped out
arts.sum: The league have announced dates for the full post-split run-in as well as the playoff schedule

arts.ttl: Celtic star Jota on his return to form and guiding the next generation at Lennoxtown
arts.sum: Celtic winger Jota has stressed the importance of experience and togetherness within the squad as the Hoops prepare to face St Johnstone in the Scottish Premiership this weekend.

arts.ttl: Celtic learn Scottish Premiership post-split schedule as SPFL reveal key dates for calendar
arts.sum: It reads: “The SPFL has today announced some key dates for the end of the season, with the William Hill Premiership post-split dates and SPFL play-offs confirmed. And the SPFL have now confirmed when the five matches will be played post-split with the other four clubs outside of the Hoops and Rangers still to be finalised.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers in 'very coachable' Daizen Maeda Celtic explanation
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers in 'very coachable' Daizen Maeda Celtic explanation.

arts.ttl: Every word from Brendan Rodgers' Celtic press conference on Friday
arts.sum: Everything Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers said to the media ahead of facing St Johnstone on Sunday.
